case_title: MESSINA, ASSUNTA AND JOSEPH VS DESIGN JEWELERS, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,150.00 FILED BY MESSINA, ASSUNTA AND JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT DESIGN JEWELERS, INC. GARABEDIAN, NAZO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-08-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CERT MAIL TO LEVON ISHAG AGENT FOR PROCESS DESIGN JEWELRY RETURNED TO COURT SIGNED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DESIGN JEWELERS, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MESSINA, ASSUNTA AND JOSEPH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DESIGN JEWELERS, INC. GARABEDIAN, NAZO $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $60.00, THE COURT ORDERS RESCISSION OF THE CONTRACT. WITHIN 30 DAYS OF THE MAILING OF THIS JUDGMENT, PLFT'S SHALL RETURN TO DEFT DESIGN JEWELERS, INC. THE SUBJECT EARRINGS; & ON RECEIPT OF THE EARRINGS DEFENDANT SHALL REFUND TO PLFT'S THE SUM OF $2200. THE COURT DISMISSES WITH PREJUDICE DEFT. NAZO GARABADIAN AS IMPROPERLY NAMED AS A PARTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT DESIGN JEWELERS, INC. GARABEDIAN, NAZO
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MESSINA, ASSUNTA AND JOSEPH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DESIGN JEWELERS, INC. GARABEDIAN, NAZO $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $90.00, (NUNC PRO TUNC CORRECTION) THE COURT ORDERS RESCISSION OF THE CONTRACT. WITHIN 30 DAYS OF THE MAILING OF THIS JUDGMENT, PLTFS SHALL RETURN TO DEFT DESIGN JEWELERS, INC, THE SUBJECT EARRINGS; & ON RECEIPT OF THE EARRINGS DEFT SHALL REFUND TO PLTFS THE SUM OF $2200. THE COURT DISMISSES W/PREJ NAZO GARABADIAN AS IMPROPERLY NAMED AS A PARTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
